# SecAI_Radar

> 🛡️ Tracking AI security papers from top-tier AI & security conferences. / 追踪顶级 AI 与安全会议中的 AI 安全相关论文。

[English](#english) | [中文](#中文)

---

## English

Tracking AI security related papers from CCF-A (and top-tier) AI & security conferences, filtered by keywords.

### Covered Conferences

| Conference | Type | CCF Rank | Data Source |
|------------|------|----------|-------------|
| IEEE S&P | Security | A | Official Accepted Papers |
| ACM CCS | Security | A | ACM DL / Official |
| USENIX Security | Security | A | Official |
| NDSS | Security | A | Official |
| SaTML | Security | — | Official (New, 2023+) |
| NeurIPS | AI | A | OpenReview API |
| ICML | AI | A | OpenReview API |
| ICLR | AI | A | OpenReview API |
| AAAI | AI | A | Official / AAAI DL |
| CVPR | AI | A | CVF Open Access |
| ECCV | AI | B | CVF Open Access |
| ACL | AI | A | ACL Anthology |
| EMNLP | AI | B | ACL Anthology |
| COLM | AI | — | OpenReview API |

### Filtering Keywords

Papers are filtered by matching keywords in title/abstract, covering:

- **Adversarial attacks & robustness**: adversarial, evasion, certified robustness
- **Backdoor & poisoning**: backdoor, trojan, data poisoning
- **Model privacy & extraction**: model stealing, membership inference, differential privacy
- **LLM/VLM/MLLM safety**: prompt injection, jailbreak, red teaming, multimodal safety
- **Watermark & deepfake**: model watermarking, deepfake detection
- **Trustworthy AI**: trustworthy AI, formal verification
- **Agent security**: agent safety, tool injection, multi-agent security, agentic security, MCP security

### Usage

```bash
pip install -r requirements.txt

# Scrape all conferences
python scripts/main.py --all

# Scrape specific conference
python scripts/main.py --conference S&P

# Regenerate README only
python scripts/main.py --generate-only
```

---

## 中文

追踪 CCF-A 类（及顶级）AI 与安全会议中的 AI 安全相关论文，通过关键词筛选。

### 覆盖会议

| 会议 | 类型 | CCF 等级 | 数据来源 |
|------|------|----------|----------|
| IEEE S&P | 安全 | A | 官网 Accepted Papers |
| ACM CCS | 安全 | A | ACM DL / 官网 |
| USENIX Security | 安全 | A | 官网 |
| NDSS | 安全 | A | 官网 |
| SaTML | 安全 | — | 官网（新会议，2023+）|
| NeurIPS | AI | A | OpenReview API |
| ICML | AI | A | OpenReview API |
| ICLR | AI | A | OpenReview API |
| AAAI | AI | A | 官网 / AAAI DL |
| CVPR | AI | A | CVF Open Access |
| ECCV | AI | B | CVF Open Access |
| ACL | AI | A | ACL Anthology |
| EMNLP | AI | B | ACL Anthology |
| COLM | AI | — | OpenReview API |

### 筛选关键词

项目通过以下类别的关键词筛选 AI 安全相关论文：

- **对抗攻击与鲁棒性**：adversarial、evasion、certified robustness
- **后门与投毒**：backdoor、trojan、data poisoning
- **模型隐私与窃取**：model stealing、membership inference、differential privacy
- **LLM/VLM/MLLM 安全**：prompt injection、jailbreak、red teaming、multimodal safety
- **水印与 Deepfake**：model watermarking、deepfake detection
- **可信 AI**：trustworthy AI、formal verification
- **Agent 安全**：agent safety、tool injection、multi-agent security、agentic security、MCP security

### 使用方式

```bash
pip install -r requirements.txt

# 运行抓取（全部会议）
python scripts/main.py --all

# 运行抓取（指定会议）
python scripts/main.py --conference S&P

# 仅重新生成 README
python scripts/main.py --generate-only
```
